name: CTX PyPI Account Takeover (Environment Variable Stealer)
description: The ctx PyPI package was taken over via expired domain. Malicious versions exfiltrate ALL environment variables (including AWS keys) as base64 to a Heroku app. ~27K malicious downloads.

affected_packages.name: ctx
affected_packages.note: Package permanently removed from PyPI. All versions between May 14-24, 2022 are malicious.

remediation: Rotate ALL environment variable secrets (especially AWS keys)
Audit AWS CloudTrail for unauthorized API calls
Package removed from PyPI - no safe version exists
